And it's okay to make mistakes. You're going to make mistakes, but as long as you course correct and get back on track, that's how that momentum is going to carry you through. So, the person who takes action first will run circles around the persons that that is strategizing. Wait, guys, we're not ready yet. We've got to focus on our strategy. We've got to write our business plan.
